description: Cross-implementation test vectors for ERDL Decision Object v1.0, extended for v1.1 SPEC coverage. Includes: unless exemption (§3.2.2), null-safe field access (§6.1), strict type matching (§6.1), metadata.decision priority (§3.4.1), DELEGATE decision type (§3.4), Guard rules (§3.2.2). Total 32 decision vectors + 7 audit hash vectors.

vectors.scenario: A financial services Agent attempts to execute a shell command outside an approved allowlist. The security Guardian blocks it.

rules.name: restrict_exec_to_allowlist
rules.description: Only commands on the finance operations allowlist may be executed
rules.message: exec blocked by financial security policy

matchedRules.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

vectors.label: DENY: A financial services Agent attempts to execute a shell command outside

vectors.scenario: The same security rule does not fire for a safe read-only tool —demonstrating least-privilege enforcement.

vectors.label: PASS: The same security rule does not fire for a safe read-only tool —demon

vectors.scenario: A low-priority operational rule attempts to override a Ring 0 security block. This MUST be rejected —override cannot tighten security.

rules.description: Ring 0 security blocks all exec

audit_vectors.note: Security DENY: financial exec blocked by Ring 0 guardian. Tests canonical serialization of a DENY decision with one matched rule.
audit_vectors.description: A financial services Agent attempts to execute a shell command outside an approved allowlist. The security Guardian blocks it.

matched_rules.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

result.reason: exec blocked by financial security policy

audit_vectors.note: Compliance REQUEST_HUMAN: PHI access triggers mandatory human review. Tests Ring 1 compliance decision with PHI context.
audit_vectors.description: A healthcare Agent processes a patient record. The compliance rule escalates to human review because PHI is involved.

matched_rules.reason: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

result.reason: PHI access requires compliance officer approval

audit_vectors.note: Override ALLOW: Ring 0 DENY overridden by Ring 3 ALLOW with explicit override flag. Tests multi-rule matched_rules array + instruction field.
audit_vectors.description: Security policy blocks all data exports. The approved ETL pipeline (override: true) relaxes this for a specific scheduled job.

result.reason: data export blocked — requires DPO approval

audit_vectors.note: Ring 0 EMERGENCY_HALT: critical anomaly triggers immediate halt —short-circuits all remaining evaluation. Tests critical severity + halt action_taken.
audit_vectors.description: Ring 0 EMERGENCY_HALT stops all evaluation immediately. Even rules that would normally match are never evaluated.

result.reason: critical anomaly detected — all agents halted

audit_vectors.note: Multi-agent trust ESCALATE: low-reputation agent operating in high-risk context. Tests ESCALATE decision with reputation context + escalated action_taken.
audit_vectors.description: A low-trust Agent (reputation < 300) operating in a high-risk context triggers escalation to human supervisor.

audit_vectors.note: Unless exemption ALLOW: unless file-path condition matches test file, rule is exempt. Tests audit hash for unless-triggered ALLOW.
audit_vectors.description: Unless condition matches a test file path, exempting the rule from DENY. Decision Object reflects ALLOW with /unless rule_ref suffix.

audit_vectors.note: Null-safe field access: missing context field compared with '!=' returns false (PASS). Tests audit hash for PASS with null propagation.
audit_vectors.description: A missing context field (context.user.role) is compared with '!='. Per v1.1 §6.1 null propagation, this returns false (not throw), resulting in PASS.
